items.briefing:
Despite Australia's social media ban for under-16s, most young people are still accessing these platforms, raising ongoing concerns about online safety that organisations working with young people should keep in mind. Separately, cyber attackers are now using AI tools to automatically test whether their malware can bypass security software undetected — meaning threats are evolving faster than ever and traditional defences may not be enough.

If your organisation holds cyber insurance, review your policy carefully — insurers are lowering premiums but quietly adding more exclusions that could leave you uncovered when it matters most. **Tip:** Ask your insurer specifically what incidents are *excluded* from your current policy.

featured.title: Most under-16s still using social media despite ban
featured.quote: Australian parents need strategies as majority of under-16s bypass social media age restrictions.
